certifications.title: ISO 9001 - Quality Management
certifications.body: Consistent product quality and process control across every stage of manufacturing.

certifications.title: ISO 14001 - Environmental Management
certifications.body: Systematic control of environmental impact across the factory and tannery.

certifications.title: ISO 45001 - Health & Safety Management
certifications.body: Safe working conditions and occupational health standards across the workforce.

certifications.title: ISO 50001 - Energy Management
certifications.body: Monitoring and reducing energy consumption throughout production.

certifications.title: SA 8000 - Social Accountability
certifications.body: Fair, ethical labour practices and working conditions across the factory.

certifications.title: Leather Working Group (LWG)
certifications.body: The leather industry's environmental audit and traceability standard.

certifications.title: MSME ZED Gold
certifications.body: Zero Defect Zero Effect certification for quality and environmentally responsible manufacturing.

certifications.title: Sustainable Leather
certifications.body: Responsible sourcing and lower-impact tanning of hides and leather.

whyCertified.title: Audited, not asserted
whyCertified.body: Every standard here is independently assessed - we don't just claim compliance, we can document it.

whyCertified.title: Buyer due-diligence ready
whyCertified.body: Certificate documents, issuing body, number and audit date are packaged for import compliance teams.

whyCertified.title: Renewed on schedule
whyCertified.body: Audits are recurring, not one-time - standards are maintained order after order, not just at onboarding.
